message:
🐛 Fix 14 test failures in OperatorStatus and RecentEvents (#10940) (#10943)

Add missing mocks for useCardData, useCardFilters, CardComponents,
Skeleton, ClusterBadge, StatusBadge, RefreshButton, and
DynamicCardErrorBoundary — matching the pattern used by other passing
card tests (e.g. HelmReleaseStatus).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
